## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding discussion and company structure overview for new hire Liz Kushnereit](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Liz will likely work with Jason on high-profile AI client accounts (e.g., Surge AI, Augment Code)](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Company structure: pre-sales (go-to-market), back office, engineering/product, and client-facing teams](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Client engagement process: 8-week sprint (onboarding) followed by 12-month contract in a pod structure](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Roles are evolving; strategists are encouraged to think first principles and add value beyond basic reporting](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Topics

### Current Onboarding Progress

  - [Liz has completed 1.5 days, reviewing extensive onboarding content](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Met with Eric, scheduled to meet with other team members](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Focusing on completing onboarding tasks by Wednesday of the following week](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)

### Potential Account Assignments

  - [Likely to work with Jason on high-profile AI client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Surge AI: $230,000/month client, diverse scope including website, podcasts, conferences, editorial, and events](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Augment Code: $50,000/month, more standard engagement with newsletter and programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Company Structure Overview

  - [Pre-sales: Tyler (Account Executive), Jason (Marketing), upcoming Events person](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Back office: Finance, HR, recruiting, legal, IT (Yousef), EA (Alice)](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Engineering/Product team](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Client-facing teams: Strategy sprint team and regular pods](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Client Engagement Process

  - [8-week sprint (onboarding/pilot) followed by 12-month contract](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Sprint process: Deep dive into client's business, creating artifacts (brand guidelines, personas, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Post-sprint: Client moves to a pod with dedicated ME, strategist, and CMs](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)

### Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Strategists: Account strategy, commercial aspects, overall account management](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Managing Editors (MEs): Content editing, keyword generation, agenda creation](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Content Managers (CMs): Content generation using AI workflows, Airtable management](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

### Company Culture and Flexibility

  - [Roles and processes are evolving; encouraged to think first principles](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Flexibility in role assignments based on skills and company needs](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule one-on-one with Jason, preferably tomorrow or Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

  - [Await final clarity from Andy next week regarding role specifics](https://fathom.video/share/LbQFvCiNwZ6yxaV4axH7muLZsy6dpyzH?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
